Name: Duchy of Andurien
Description: Under House Humphreys Andurien was a restive province with a strong anti-Marik bias, which led it to secede from the Free Worlds League in 3030 and attempt an invasion of the weakened Capellan Confederation in alliance with the Magistracy of Canopus. Andurien was considered a particularly open and enlightened form of this government, with citizens enjoying substantial freedoms. Andurien was profoundly influenced by the Welsh traditions of House Humphreys alongside Spanish and Italian culture, Anduriens are a notably proud and self-reliant people.
ReputationStatements: I don't know why we bother offering you contracts, to be perfectly honest. Andurien has no shortage of volunteers eager to defend their homeland. Yet here we are.
I generally prefer diplomacy. Unfortunately, diplomacy occasionally requires armed support.
Freedom is rarely maintained through good intentions alone. Competence and BattleMechs help.
Pride alone does not secure a border, Commander. The Duchy of Andurien has a use for mercenaries.
Andurien values its independence, Commander. Preserving it occasionally demands difficult decisions.
Greetings, my friend. It is a pleasure dealing with those who keep their word. This operation serves the interests of the Duchy and its citizens.
Your company has conducted itself with professionalism and honor. The Duchy remembers its friends.
MissionSuccessStatements: Success such as this helps ensure Andurien's future remains in Andurien hands.
GoodFaithFailureStatements: A setback, certainly, though hardly a disaster. The Duchy has overcome greater obstacles than this.
BadFaithFailureStatements: The Duchy entrusted you with an important responsibility. I regret that your company chose this course.
